# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /Users/perkunas/jail/3dgs-002/build
# It was generated by CMake: /opt/homebrew/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for Async++.
Async++_DIR:PATH=/Users/perkunas/.ezvcpkg/56bb2411609227288b70117ead2c47585ba07713/installed/arm64-osx/share/async++

//Build shared libraries
BUILD_SHARED_LIBS:BOOL=ON

//Build the testing tree.
BUILD_TESTING:BOOL=ON

//Path to a program.
CCACHE_FOUND:FILEPATH=CCACHE_FOUND-NOTFOUND

//Sets the number of threads for run-clang-tidy to use.
CESIUM_CLANG_TIDY_USE_THREADS:STRING=14

//Whether to enable the -ftime-trace compilation option when building
// with Clang.
CESIUM_CLANG_TIME_TRACE:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to enable code coverage
CESIUM_COVERAGE_ENABLED:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to enable tracking of tile _doNotUnloadSubtreeCount modifications
// for tile unloading debugging.
CESIUM_DEBUG_TILE_UNLOADING:BOOL=OFF

//Disable cesium-native's use of libcurl
CESIUM_DISABLE_CURL:BOOL=ON

//Whether to disable the WGS84 default value for ellipsoid parameters
// across cesium-native.
CESIUM_DISABLE_DEFAULT_ELLIPSOID:BOOL=OFF

//Disable cesium-native's use of libjpeg-turbo. JPEG images will
// be decoded with STB instead.
CESIUM_DISABLE_LIBJPEG_TURBO:BOOL=OFF

//Enable clang-tidy targets for static code analysis.
CESIUM_ENABLE_CLANG_TIDY:BOOL=ON

//Run clang-tidy while building. Will slow down the build process.
// Available only if CESIUM_ENABLE_CLANG_TIDY is ON.
CESIUM_ENABLE_CLANG_TIDY_ON_BUILD:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to force strict GLM compile definitions.
CESIUM_GLM_STRICT_ENABLED:BOOL=ON

//Whether to install the header files of cesium-native and its
// public dependencies.
CESIUM_INSTALL_HEADERS:BOOL=ON

//Whether to install the static libraries of cesium-native and
// its dependencies.
CESIUM_INSTALL_STATIC_LIBS:BOOL=ON

//Whether to enable static linking for MSVC runtimes
CESIUM_MSVC_STATIC_RUNTIME_ENABLED:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to enable tests
CESIUM_TESTS_ENABLED:BOOL=ON

//Whether to enable the Cesium performance tracing framework (CESIUM_TRACE_*
// macros).
CESIUM_TRACING_ENABLED:BOOL=OFF

//use ezvcpkg helper
CESIUM_USE_EZVCPKG:BOOL=ON

//Enable 64-bit WebAssembly target
CESIUM_WASM64:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=CMAKE_ADDR2LINE-NOTFOUND

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ar

//Choose the type of build, options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo
// MinSizeRel ...
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=Release

//Enable/Disable color output during build.
CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE:BOOL=ON

//CXX compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/c++

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//C compiler

//Flags used by the C compiler during all build types.

//Flags used by the C compiler during DEBUG builds.
